Note: for naming purposes, most tests are title with as e.g. "test_nlargest_foo"
but are implicitly also testing nsmallest_foo.

uint64c
    A DataFrame with many dtypes
    * datetime
    * datetimetz
    * timedelta
    * [u]int{8,16,32,64}
    * float{32,64}
    The columns are the name of the dtype.
